heading: Congressional oversight
label: 437 Congressional oversight
notes: Amendments2013—Subsec. (a). , substituted “congressional defense committees and the congressional intelligence committees” for “the intelligence committees”.Pub. L. 113–66, § 921(c)(1)Subsec. (b). , substituted “The Secretary” for “Consistent with title V of the National Security Act of 1947 ( et seq.), the Secretary” and “congressional defense committees and the congressional intelligence committees” for “the intelligence committees”.Pub. children.heading: .—Proposed Regulations
children.label: a .—Proposed Regulations
children.text: Copies of regulations proposed to be prescribed under (including any proposed revision to such regulations) shall be submitted to congressional defense committees and the congressional intelligence committees not less than 30 days before they take effect.section 436 of this title

children.heading: .—Current Information
children.label: b .—Current Information
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall ensure that congressional defense committees and the congressional intelligence committees are kept fully and currently informed of actions taken pursuant to this subchapter, including any significant anticipated activity to be authorized pursuant to this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Congressional Intelligence Committees Defined
children.label: c .—Congressional Intelligence Committees Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “congressional intelligence committees” has the meaning given the term in section 3 of the National Security Act of 1947 ().50 U.S.C. 3003
